title: 부천일신중 2학년 영어 1학기 기말 모의고사 2회
subject: 영어
passage:
의사소통기능
⦁ 길 묻고 답하기
A: How can I get to the museum?
B: Go straight two blocks and make a left.

⦁ 소요시간 말하기
A: How long will it take to get there?
B: It will take about 15 minutes.

언어 형식
⦁ 현재 완료
I have known her since I was 10 years old.

⦁ ask/tell/want + 목적어 + to부정사
Amelia told me to try the fish and chips.

---

Topic 1 A, B: 길 묻기와 소요시간
B: Excuse me. How can I get to the post office?
G: Go straight one block. Then make a right. It will be on your left.
B: How long will it take to get there?
G: It will take only 5 minutes.

---

본문: See You in London!

I can't wait to tell you about my trip to London. The flight took 15 hours from Incheon. When I met my friend Amelia at the airport, I was so excited. I have known her since I was 10 years old. She took me to many places in London. Come with me on my amazing trip!

Beautiful Palace

We got on the famous red bus and the first stop was Buckingham Palace. The King and his family live there. We saw the King's Guard. The guards were wearing red jackets and tall black hats. We took pictures near them, but they didn't smile or move. They were like statues!

Yummy Meal

Next, we went to Camden Market. This market is known for its food from around the world. Amelia told me to try the fish and chips. I thought, "How strange! I have eaten fish many times before...

questions.question: 'How can I get to the museum?'는 어떤 의사소통 기능을 나타내는가?
questions.explanation: 'How can I get to'는 길을 묻는 표현입니다.

questions.question: 'How long will it take to get there?'의 의사소통 기능은?
questions.explanation: 'How long will it take'는 소요시간을 묻습니다.

questions.question: 'I have known her since I was 10 years old'는 어떤 시제인가?
현재완료의 의미로 가장 올바른 것은?
questions.explanation: 현재완료는 과거부터 현재까지의 지속된 경험을 나타냅니다.

questions.question: 'Amelia told me to try the fish and chips'의 구조는?
다음 중 'ask/tell/want + 목적어 + to부정사'로 올바르게 사용된 것은?
choices: I want you to help me

questions.question: 'Go straight two blocks and make a left'의 'make a left'는 무엇을 의미하는가?
'The flight took 15 hours'에서 'took'의 의미는?
'I have known her'와 'I knew her'의 차이는?
choices: 전자는 현재까지 알고 있음, 후자는 과거에만 알았음

questions.question: 'The guards were wearing red jackets and tall black hats'는 어떤 시제인가?
questions.explanation: 'were + -ing'는 과거 진행형이 아니라 '~하고 있었다'라는 상태를 나타냅니다.

questions.question: 'Buckingham Palace'는 어디에 있는가?
questions.explanation: 본문: 'We got on the famous red bus and the first stop was Buckingham Palace'

questions.question: 'The King's Guard'의 특징으로 옳은 것은?
questions.explanation: 본문: 'they didn't smile or move. They were like statues!'

questions.question: 'Camden Market'으로 유명한 것은?
questions.explanation: 본문: 'This market is known for its food from around the world'

questions.question: Subin이 런던에서 가장 흥분했던 순간은?
questions.explanation: 본문: 'When I met my friend Amelia at the airport, I was so excited'

questions.question: 'I can't wait to'의 의미는?
'They were like statues'가 의미하는 바는?
Subin의 비행 시간은 얼마였는가?
questions.explanation: 본문: 'The flight took 15 hours from Incheon'

questions.question: 현재완료 'have/has + 과거분사'를 사용할 수 없는 경우는?
questions.explanation: 지정된 과거 시간('yesterday', 'last week' 등)에는 단순과거를 사용합니다.

questions.question: 'She took me to many places in London'에서 'took'가 의미하는 것은?
Subin과 Amelia의 관계는?
questions.explanation: 본문: 'my friend Amelia' 그리고 'I have known her since I was 10 years old'

questions.question: 'How can I get to the library?'라는 길 묻는 질문에 영어로 길 찾기 답변을 만드세요.
questions.answer: Go straight three blocks and make a right. / Turn left on Main Street. (또는 유사한 길 찾기 표현)
questions.explanation: 길 찾기는 방향 표현을 포함해야 합니다.

questions.question: 'I have eaten pizza five times'가 의미하는 바를 한국어로 설명하세요.
'She told him to go home'을 '그녀는 그에게 집에 가도록 말했다'는 의미로 바꾸세요.
questions.answer: 이미 올바르게 번역되었습니다. (또는 'She said to him to go home'은 틀렸고 원문이 맞습니다)

questions.question: 런던 여행에서 Subin이 경험한 두 가지 주요 장소와 각각의 특징을 본문에서 찾아 쓰세요.
questions.answer: 1. Buckingham Palace - King이 사는 곳, King's Guard가 있음 2. Camden Market - 세계 음식이 있는 시장

questions.question: 'I have known her since I was 10 years old'에서 현재완료를 사용한 이유를 설명하세요.
questions.answer: 10살부터 현재까지 계속 Amelia를 알고 있기 때문에 (지속된 상태를 표현)
